about.activeMaintenanceBody: This app is actively maintained for student planning, support, and transfer tools.
about.aiHelperBody: Use recommendations and planning help as a starting point, then confirm important decisions with official sources.
about.builtForTransferPlanningBody: Track the details that matter while you compare colleges and prepare for transfer.
about.currentDescription: Gator Guide helps Green River students keep transfer planning, college search, deadlines, and next steps in one place.
about.disclaimerBody: Gator Guide provides recommendations based on available data and your profile information. Admission decisions are made by individual institutions and may change over time. Always confirm deadlines, transfer requirements, and scholarship details directly with the college or organization before you apply.
about.planningToolNote: Gator Guide is a planning tool and does not guarantee admission, scholarship awards, or transfer outcomes.
about.step1Body: The app reviews your profile, coursework, GPA, and stated goals to build a clearer picture of where you are now.
about.step2Body: Your preferences for location, campus feel, cost, and major fit are compared against the college and opportunity data we have available.
about.step3Body: Recommendations are ranked using your answers, saved colleges, planning progress, and opportunity matches so the next steps feel relevant.
about.step4Body: As you update your profile, upload documents, and complete tasks, the app refreshes deadlines, suggestions, and guidance.
about.subtitle: Helping Green River College students turn transfer planning into clear next steps.
about.title: About Gator Guide

auth.accountDisabled: यह खाता अक्षम कर दिया गया है। यदि आपको लगता है कि यह गलती है, तो सहायता से संपर्क करें।
auth.continueAsGuest: अतिथि के रूप में जारी रखें
auth.emailAlreadyInUse: This email is already registered. Please log in instead.
auth.forgotPasswordMessage: अपना ईमेल दर्ज करें और हम आपको रीसेट लिंक भेजेंगे
auth.invalidCredential: गलत ईमेल या पासवर्ड। फिर से कोशिश करें या नीचे 'पासवर्ड भूल गए?' का उपयोग करें।
auth.loginFailed: प्रमाणीकरण विफल। कृपया फिर से कोशिश करें।
auth.name: पूरा नाम
auth.networkError: नेटवर्क त्रुटि। अपना कनेक्शन जाँचें और फिर से कोशिश करें।
auth.no_matches: इस ईमेल पते के साथ कोई खाता नहीं मिला।
auth.oauthFallbackHint: Google/Microsoft sign-in may fail on localhost.
auth.passwordMinimum: पासवर्ड कम से कम 6 अक्षरों का होना चाहिए।
auth.passwordResetInstructions: पासवर्ड रीसेट करने के लिए ईमेल में दिए लिंक पर क्लिक करें। यदि नहीं दिखे, तो स्पैम फ़ोल्डर जाँचें।
auth.passwordResetSent: हमने पासवर्ड रीसेट लिंक भेजा है:

presentation.accountDeletedMessage: Your account has been deleted successfully.
presentation.deleteRetryLogin: Please sign in again, then delete your account from Settings.
presentation.googleDevBuildRequired: Google sign-in needs a development build on mobile. For now, use email/password or continue as guest.
presentation.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is not available right now. Use email/password or continue as guest.
presentation.microsoftUnavailable: Microsoft sign-in is not available right now. Use email/password or continue as guest.
presentation.oauthFallback: Provider sign-in could not be completed. Try another sign-in option.
presentation.providerUnavailableWeb: Provider sign-in could not be completed in this browser.
presentation.signInMethodUnavailable: That sign-in method is not available right now. Please try another option or contact support.

auth.providerAvailableOnWeb: Google/Microsoft साइन-इन वेब संस्करण पर उपलब्ध है।
auth.providerNotConfigured: Google साइन-इन कॉन्फ़िगर नहीं है। EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID सेट करें।
auth.providerNotConfiguredMs: Microsoft साइन-इन कॉन्फ़िगर नहीं है। EXPO_PUBLIC_MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID सेट करें।
auth.signInMethodDisabled: यह साइन-इन विधि सक्षम नहीं है। कृपया सहायता से संपर्क करें।
auth.tooManyAttempts: बहुत अधिक प्रयास। कृपया थोड़ी देर प्रतीक्षा करें और फिर से कोशिश करें।

validation.failed_message: पासवर्ड रीसेट ईमेल भेजने में विफल। कृपया फिर से कोशिश करें।
validation.invalid_email: ईमेल पते का फ़ॉर्मेट अमान्य है।

auth.wrongPassword: गलत पासवर्ड। कृपया फिर से कोशिश करें।

collegeSearchTool.otherToolsBody: Jump to the other planning tools tied into the same workflow.
collegeSearchTool.questionnaireCardBody: Fill it out if you want extra planning help elsewhere in the app.
collegeSearchTool.rankingBody: Keep weighted ranking on for profile-aware results, or open advanced search to fine-tune the factors.
collegeSearchTool.resultsBody: Results show schools returned by school-name and College Scorecard program-tag search.
collegeSearchTool.searchPromptBody: Search above to see colleges, saved-school actions, and program tags here.
collegeSearchTool.searchSectionBody: Enter a school name or major like Computer Engineering to pull matching colleges from College Scorecard data.
collegeSearchTool.subtitleReady: Search colleges directly by school name or College Scorecard major tags.
collegeSearchTool.subtitleSetup: Search colleges now. The questionnaire still helps other planning tools, but this page is just a direct search.
collegeSearchTool.title: College Search
collegeSearchTool.weightedOffBody: Weighted ranking is off right now, so results will behave more like a straightforward search.

compare.chooseAtLeastTwo: Choose at least 2 colleges to view a full comparison.
compare.compareTwoToFour: Pick 2 to 4 colleges to unlock the full side-by-side table.
compare.prefillHint: We preselected up to {count} saved colleges to get you started.
compare.refreshingData: Loading more Scorecard details for your selected colleges...

compare.searchResultsEmptyHint: Try a college name, city, state, or program keyword.

compare.selectionLimitHint: You can compare up to 4 colleges at once.
compare.subtitle: उपशीर्षक
compare.title: शीर्षक

cost.estimateInputsHint: Everything below is editable. Tuition is prefilled when official data is available, and the rest should match your own housing, book, travel, and aid expectations.
cost.netPriceHint: Average net price is official after-aid data from College Scorecard. It is shown as a benchmark and is not inserted into your estimate automatically.
cost.noOfficialTuitionHint: No official tuition was available for this school, so enter your own estimate.
cost.officialDataHint: College Scorecard data for {college}. We use the student type below to prefill tuition when it is available.
cost.prefillHint: Tuition is prefilled from {college}. Switch the student type below to compare in-state and out-of-state pricing.
cost.resultNote: Tuition and average net price come from official College Scorecard data when available. Other fields and yearly inflation are your own estimates.
cost.selectFromSaved: सहेजे गए कॉलेजों से त्वरित भरें
cost.subtitle: उपशीर्षक
cost.title: शीर्षक
cost.tuitionPrefillHint: Prefilled from {college} using the {type} tuition when available. You can still edit it.

deadlineCalendar.nextAvailableSummary: The calendar is showing the next available dated items until this month has results.
deadlineCalendar.noDatedItemsMessage: Save colleges or add more opportunities to start building your deadline calendar.
deadlineCalendar.noItemsThisMonthMessage: The list below is showing the next available dated deadlines instead.
deadlineCalendar.selectDateToRevealMessage: Some application deadlines stay tucked into their calendar date. Tap a highlighted day to view the details.
deadlineCalendar.subtitle: See planning dates, scholarships, internships, and college deadlines in one place.
deadlineCalendar.tapHint: Tap a highlighted day to focus the agenda list. Tap it again to clear the filter.
deadlineCalendar.title: Deadline Calendar
deadlineCalendar.unableToOpenMessage: That deadline link or page could not be opened.

details.admissionsAndOutcomesBody: Use these numbers to understand how selective the school is and what student completion looks like.
details.campusAndLocationBody: Check where the school is, what kind of environment it offers, and which data year you are looking at.
details.compareYourRealCosts: Estimate your likely out-of-pocket cost before you apply.
details.costAndAidBody: Review tuition, net price, aid coverage, and debt before deciding whether this school is realistic for you.
details.exploreCollegeBody: Use this page to decide whether the school is worth deeper research, a saved spot on your list, or an application.
details.noPrograms: Program details are not available yet for this school.
details.programsAndFocusBody: Scan the majors and program areas this school is most associated with before opening the full data.
details.quickActionsBody: Jump to the college website, estimate your real cost, or save this school so you can come back later.
details.rawScorecardBody: Need the complete underlying data? Expand this section to search every available Scorecard field for the college.
details.saveCollegeBody: Keep this school in your list while you compare programs, price, and fit.
details.savedCollegeBody: This school is already in your saved list.
details.studentSnapshotBody: Start with the four numbers students usually care about first: selectivity, completion, size, and likely cost.

errorBoundary.body: Please copy the error log and send it so we can fix this quickly.
errorBoundary.failedToSendMessage: Could not send the error log to support. Verify your webhook endpoint (or Firestore rules) and try again.
errorBoundary.savedToSupportLogs: Error log saved to support logs.
errorBoundary.supportEndpointMissingMessage: Set EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPPORT_ERROR_LOG_WEBHOOK or sign in so logs can be stored in Firestore.
errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong

home.advancedSearchHint: Switch ON to include a factor in ranking. Switch OFF to ignore it.

privacy.description: Gator Guide uses the information you choose to provide to run planning, saving, account, and AI features.
privacy.note: Gator Guide does not sell personal information.
privacy.whatYouProvideBody: Profile details, questionnaire answers, saved colleges, deadlines, optional uploads, and support messages.
privacy.whereItLivesBody: Guest data is mainly local. Signed-in data may sync through Firebase. Transcript files are treated local-first where supported.
privacy.yourChoicesBody: Use guest mode, skip optional AI or uploads, edit saved details, disable notifications, or delete your account.

resources.wsosDesc: योग्य WA छात्रों के लिए छात्रवृत्तियाँ और सहायता।
resources.wsosJobsDesc: WSOS पार्टनरों से नौकरियाँ और इंटर्नशिप अवसर।
resources.wwuDesc: भविष्य के ट्रांसफर छात्रों के लिए ट्रांसफर प्रवेश और सहायता का अवलोकन।

roadmap.aiGuidanceDescription: व्यक्तिगत सलाह और कार्य सुझाव प्राप्त करें
roadmap.createProfileToStart: शुरू करने के लिए प्रोफ़ाइल बनाएँ
roadmap.importExport: अपने डेटा को इम्पोर्ट या एक्सपोर्ट करें
roadmap.organizeDocuments: निबंध, ट्रांसक्रिप्ट आदि अपलोड और व्यवस्थित करें
roadmap.timelineDescription: माइलस्टोन और डेडलाइन के साथ ट्रैक पर रहें
roadmap.trackRequirements: सभी आवश्यकताओं और समय-सीमाओं को ट्रैक करें
roadmap.unlockJourney: इन सुविधाओं के साथ व्यक्तिगत कॉलेज आवेदन यात्रा अनलॉक करने के लिए खाता बनाएँ:

savedColleges.emptyHint: Bookmark colleges from search results or college details and they will appear here automatically.
savedColleges.noSearchResultsHint: Try a college name, state, city, or program keyword.
savedColleges.noSearchResultsTitle: No saved colleges match that search
savedColleges.subtitle: Your bookmarked colleges stay organized here and update with your current save logic.
savedColleges.title: Saved Colleges

searchableSelect.browseHint: Browse options or start typing to filter.

settings.accountActionsDescription: Use these only when you need to leave the current account or permanently remove it from GatorGuide.
settings.automaticNotificationsSubtitle: Choose which reminders GatorGuide notifies you for.
settings.cacheAutoClear5d: हर 5 दिनों में कैश स्वतः साफ करें
settings.cacheAutoClearDescription: अस्थायी खोज और AI कैश डेटा स्वतः हटाता है।
settings.clearCacheConfirmMessage: यह सहेजी गई खोज और AI कैश डेटा को साफ करके सिफारिशें रिफ्रेश करता है।
settings.clearCacheDescription: अस्थायी कैश डेटा अभी हटाएँ। इससे आपका खाता नहीं हटेगा।
settings.desktopAboutDescription: Keep support, legal pages, and build details together so they are easy to find.
settings.desktopAdvancedCollapsedDescription: Expand this section to manage cache cleanup and debugging tools.
settings.desktopAdvancedDescription: Maintenance tools stay tucked away here, with cache controls and debug actions in one place.
settings.desktopDataDescription: Import or export your local app snapshot so you can move data safely between devices.
settings.desktopIntro: Manage notifications, appearance, backups, support, and account tools in one place.
settings.desktopSettingsDescription: Control the app behavior you feel every day, from alerts to theme and language.
settings.exportDescription: Save your current local app data as a JSON backup you can keep or move elsewhere.
settings.importDescription: Bring in a saved local app snapshot from another device or backup file.
settings.supportComposerSubtitle: Send a question or report an issue.
settings.supportEmailAppUnavailable: Could not open your email app.
settings.supportEmptyMessage: Please type a message before sending.
settings.supportFallbackEmail: We couldn't send the message here, so we opened your email app instead.
settings.supportOpenedEmailApp: Opened your email app to send the message.

setup.subtitle: हमें अपने लक्ष्यों के बारे में बताएँ ताकि हम आपकी सिफारिशें व्यक्तिगत कर सकें।
setup.title: अपनी प्रोफ़ाइल सेट करें

suggestedSchedule.allowStemPrepAccessibility: Allow STEM prep classes in quarter planning
suggestedSchedule.allowStemPrepHint: Includes placement-dependent prep classes such as Precalculus I/II and general physics before Calculus I or Engineering Physics I.
suggestedSchedule.allowSummerAccessibility: Allow summer classes in quarter planning
suggestedSchedule.allowSummerHint: Includes summer quarter when building your future course plan.
suggestedSchedule.chooseAtLeastCredits: Choose at least {credits} from approved options
suggestedSchedule.grcDescription: This is your Green River plan for finishing the {degreeTitle} {noun} at {campus}. Completed transcript classes stay marked as done, and the planner fills in the remaining GRC {noun} courses still ahead.
suggestedSchedule.nothingElseRequired: Nothing else is required in this planned quarter.
suggestedSchedule.onlyUwEssentialAccessibility: Only show classes that transfer into UW on this track
suggestedSchedule.onlyUwEssentialHint: Hides nonessential Green River track classes while keeping prerequisite classes, official UW transfer admission guidance when applicable, and Gen-Eds that still unlock UW-required work.
suggestedSchedule.remainingCreditsSuffix: left in order to finish what you can for the {credential}
suggestedSchedule.requiredForGrcProgram: Required for this Green River program.
suggestedSchedule.scheduleAdvisor: Schedule a meeting with a GRC advisor
suggestedSchedule.stemPrepGuidance: Turn off 'Allow STEM prep classes' to skip unnecessary placement-dependent prep classes like Precalculus I/II or general physics when you are ready to start with Calculus I and Engineering Physics I.
suggestedSchedule.uwEssentialDescription: This is your transfer plan for finishing the {degreeTitle} degree at {campus}. It starts focused on UW-required classes, official UW transfer admission guidance when applicable, Gen-Eds, and prerequisite dependencies. Turn off Classes for UW transfer only to include optional Green River track classes. {guidance}
suggestedSchedule.uwFullDescription: This is your transfer plan for finishing the {degreeTitle} degree at {campus}. Turn on Classes for UW transfer only to hide optional Green River track classes and focus on UW-required classes, official UW transfer admission guidance when applicable, Gen-Eds, and prerequisite dependencies. {guidance}

terms.description: Use Gator Guide responsibly, protect your account, and verify important school decisions with official sources.
terms.note: Continuing to use Gator Guide means you accept the current Terms.
terms.planningOnlyBody: Gator Guide helps organize transfer planning but does not guarantee admissions, scholarships, deadlines, or requirements.
terms.respectfulUseBody: Do not misuse, disrupt, scrape, reverse engineer, or interfere with the app or other users.
terms.yourAccountBody: You are responsible for activity under your account and for keeping your sign-in details secure.

tools.saveCollegesFirst: इन उपकरणों का उपयोग करने से पहले कुछ कॉलेज सहेजें
tools.saveCollegesFirstHint: खोज परिणामों या कॉलेज विवरण में कॉलेज बुकमार्क करें, फिर अपनी सहेजी गई सूची के साथ तुलना और लागत कैलकुलेटर का उपयोग करें।

transferEquivalencies.campusHelperGrc: Choose the UW transfer destination used to verify these Green River category tags.
transferEquivalencies.campusHelperUw: Choose which UW campus to browse source-backed transfer category equivalencies for.
transferEquivalencies.collegeHelper: Choose whether to browse UW transfer outcomes or Green River source courses.
transferEquivalencies.grcDescription: Browse Green River courses that satisfy transfer categories.
transferEquivalencies.noMatchesBody: Try a different course code, title, UW outcome, or category.
transferEquivalencies.noTaggedBody: This campus currently has no source-backed category-tagged transfer rows for the selected filter.
transferEquivalencies.pageDescriptionGrc: Green River College courses with source-backed {campus} transfer category tags for {categories}, and related requirement categories.
transferEquivalencies.pageDescriptionUw: Eligible Green River to {campus} transfer options for {categories}, and related requirement categories.
transferEquivalencies.searchHelperGrc: Search by Green River course, title, UW transfer outcome, or category.
transferEquivalencies.searchHelperUw: Search by Green River course, UW outcome, title, or category.
transferEquivalencies.title: Transfer Category Equivalencies
transferEquivalencies.uwDescription: Browse UW transfer outcomes for Green River courses.

transferPlanner.bestGreenRiverPath: Best Green River Transfer Associates path
transferPlanner.bestGreenRiverPathDescription: This shows the Green River degree path that best matches the UW degree you picked.
transferPlanner.bugReportBody:
Please describe what happened in Course Planner:


A current Course Planner log is attached when your email app supports attachments.
transferPlanner.buildingPlannerBody: Loading the selected requirements, matching Green River courses, and then building the quarter plan.
transferPlanner.collegeHelper: Pick the college whose program requirements you want this planner to follow.
transferPlanner.coursePlannerLogTruncated: [Course Planner log truncated because this email app does not support attachments here.]
transferPlanner.degreeSpecificsDefault: These sections summarize the official UW degree structure already lifted into the planner for this major.
transferPlanner.degreeSpecificsSelectedPathway: These sections summarize the official UW degree structure currently attached to the {pathway} route for this major.
transferPlanner.emailUnavailableBody: We couldn't open your email app. Please email {email} to report the bug.
transferPlanner.friendlyTranscriptError: We couldn't read past classes from this unofficial transcript yet. Upload the PDF directly from ctcLink using the link below.
transferPlanner.grcCampusHelper: Green River currently has one supported campus in this planner.
transferPlanner.grcClassListForMajor: Open this dropdown for the Green River class list currently attached to this major.
transferPlanner.grcClassListForProgram: Open this dropdown for the Green River class list attached to this program.
transferPlanner.grcHeroDescription: Pick a Green River program and build the remaining course plan for that path.
transferPlanner.grcMajorHelper: Pick the Green River program you want the course plan to follow.
transferPlanner.grcTrackDescription: Open this dropdown for all classes needed to complete the {title} transfer track at GRC.
transferPlanner.grcTrackProgramDescription: Open this dropdown for all classes needed to complete the {title} {noun} at GRC.
transferPlanner.grcTrackedRequirementsSummary: Open this dropdown for the currently tracked Green River {noun} requirements.
transferPlanner.hiddenEvaluationCount: {count} course {evaluationNoun} stayed internal because this planner path is not source-verified for students.
transferPlanner.majorRequiredGenEdsDescription: Source-backed major-specific general education targets from the current official major materials.
transferPlanner.majorSpecificsSummaryFallback: Open this dropdown for major details as they become available.
transferPlanner.majorSpecificsSummaryWithOfficial: Open this dropdown for the official UW degree page for your selected major.
transferPlanner.majorSpecificsSummaryWithOfficialAndSect: Open this dropdown for the official UW degree page and degree-specific requirement sections for your selected major.
transferPlanner.majorSpecificsSummaryWithSections: Open this dropdown for degree-specific requirement sections for your selected major.
transferPlanner.noClassEquivalenciesBody: There are no class equivalencies for this major right now.
transferPlanner.noGrcDegreeMajorCourseList: No Green River degree-counting major-course list is available for this degree yet.
transferPlanner.noGrcProgramMajorCourseList: No Green River major-course list is available for this program yet.
transferPlanner.noGrcProgramPlan: There is not a Green River program plan for this path yet.
transferPlanner.noGrcTrackGenEdTargets: No Green River track general-education targets are currently tagged for this route yet.
transferPlanner.noGrcTrackMajorCourseList: No Green River degree-counting major-course list is available for this track yet.
transferPlanner.noParsedUwCourseList: No parsed UW course list is available for this major yet.
transferPlanner.noSourceBackedGenEdTargets: No source-backed major-specific general education targets are currently published for this major.
transferPlanner.noSourceBackedTargetOutcome: No source-backed UW target outcome for this selected major.
transferPlanner.noSourceBackedUwRequiredPath: No source-backed UW-required major-course path is available for this major yet.
transferPlanner.noUwCoursePlan: There is not a course plan for this campus yet.
transferPlanner.officialUwDegreePageDescription: This is the main UW page the planner should use for the full degree requirements for this major.
transferPlanner.openMajorBody: This is an open major. You would transfer through general UW admission first, then declare {major} through the department's current process after you enroll.
transferPlanner.pathwayHelper: This major has multiple supported routes. Pick the route you want this planner to follow.
transferPlanner.profileNeededAlertBody: Open the app as a guest or signed-in student first.
transferPlanner.profileNeededMessage: Start as a guest or sign in, then come back here to build a transcript-based course plan.
transferPlanner.profileNeededTitle: Open this as a student profile first
transferPlanner.pullingCompletedClasses: Pulling completed classes from your unofficial transcript...
transferPlanner.quarterPlanNoteGrc: This {noun} does not have a fixed quarter-by-quarter plan yet. Use the tracked Green River {noun} classes above as your starting point while more source-backed sequencing data is added.
transferPlanner.quarterPlanNoteUw: This degree does not have a fixed quarter-by-quarter plan yet. Use the Green River class list and source-backed class-order notes above as your starting point. This planner only shows a source-backed plan, and unsupported majors, rules, or sequences stay hidden until public sources can verify them.
transferPlanner.remainingClassesBeforeTappedOut: {count} more {classNoun} before Green River College is tapped out for {campus} {major} degree.
transferPlanner.selectedGreenRiverProgramPathDescription: This is the Green River program path the planner is currently following.
transferPlanner.transcriptBasedCoursePlanBody: The planner is reading past completed classes from your unofficial transcript so it can mark what is already done.
transferPlanner.transcriptEvaluationDescription: Open this dropdown for specifics on how your transcript gets applied
transferPlanner.transcriptUploadFailedBody: We couldn't use that transcript yet.
transferPlanner.uploadUnofficialTranscriptBody: This planner uses the classes from your unofficial transcript PDF. The unofficial transcript is only stored locally.
transferPlanner.uwCampusHelper: Set the UW campus and major you want this Green River plan to match against.
transferPlanner.uwCoursesConsideredDescription: All UW courses parsed from the official degree source for this major.
transferPlanner.uwDegreeClassesDescriptionFallback: Open this dropdown for major requirements and Green River equivalents as they become available.
transferPlanner.uwDegreeClassesDescriptionReady: Open this dropdown for categorized major requirements, Gen-Eds, Green River equivalents, and UW options from the official degree source.
transferPlanner.uwHeroDescription: Pick a UW campus and major, then compare your Green River path against the selected degree.
transferPlanner.uwMajorHelper: Pick the UW bachelor's degree you want the course plan to follow.
